change_summary: Change the material of the structure to marble

geometry_changes.description: Structure resized to account for density difference between original material and marble

cascade_issues.title: Structural integrity compromised by material change
cascade_issues.description: Marble is significantly less dense and structurally weaker than the original material, leading to potential failure under launch loads.

cascade_issues.title: Shock test required due to material change
cascade_issues.description: The new material may not withstand the shock loads specified in the launcher SRS ICD, necessitating a retest.

cascade_issues.title: Thermal performance degradation due to material change
cascade_issues.description: Marble has different thermal properties, potentially increasing the ΔT across orbital cycles and violating the temperature stability requirement.

cascade_issues.title: Increased power consumption due to material change
cascade_issues.description: The thermal properties of marble may require additional heaters or cooling systems, increasing the average power consumption.

open_non_conformance_reports.title: Structural integrity compromised by material change
open_non_conformance_reports.description: The structural integrity of the satellite is compromised due to the use of marble, which does not meet the required strength and density specifications.

open_non_conformance_reports.title: Thermal performance degradation due to material change
open_non_conformance_reports.description: The thermal properties of marble may cause an increase in ΔT across orbital cycles, violating the temperature stability requirement.

ecss_open_validation_items.activity: Shock test per launcher SRS ICD
Thermal balance test to validate TMM

system_constraints.constraint: Mass budget: 35.0 kg total | Current: 34.2 kg | Margin: 0.8 kg
system_constraints.impact: Reduced mass margin due to density difference between original material and marble.

system_constraints.constraint: First natural frequency: 80 Hz min | Current: 108 Hz | Margin: 28 Hz
system_constraints.impact: Potential reduction in structural rigidity leading to lower natural frequencies, possibly below the required minimum.
